C&D Safety Management System Phase 1 Implemented

payload.claim_text: Safety Oversight has implemented the Safety Management System – Phase 1 of 3 phases, implementing the new Safety Management System (SMS) throughout the entire agency but rolling out the program in stages
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development

payload.claim_text: C&D Safety Oversight is finalizing the Phase 2 training materials rollout and final enhancement to the SMS with AECOM. The tentative rollout is currently scheduled for February 2024.
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development

payload.claim_text: In September, Metro-North participated in Rail Safety Week 2023. Rail Safety Week was held Monday, September 18 through Sunday, September 24 across the U.S., Canada, and Mexico. This is Metro-North's sixth year of participation.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Running a de-escalation training program for new and existing conductors. 100% of Conductors will receive this training by the end of 2023.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Since 2016, MNR Security has investigated every instance of Workplace Violence (WPV) that has been reported by MNR employees.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: NYCT Only with DOT FRA Stand-Down Policy

payload.claim_text: Only New York City Transit has a DOT FRA approved stand-down policy to remove an employee from safety sensitive functions. All MTA Agencies have a 24 hour clearance policy.
payload.subject: New York City Transit

payload.claim_text: Six recommendations were closed this year. Four remaining recommendations are classified as Open-Acceptable Action. No new formal onsite investigations from July 2020 to current date.
payload.subject: MTA

payload.description: Advance a multiphase project with AECOM to audit, evaluate, recommend, and implement a new Safety Management System (SMS) with MTA C&D, including an IT platform selection and data management application. Phase 1 of 3 phases implemented. Phase 2 rollout scheduled for February 2024.
